Phase Base W5, polarized Z1 work; carry-forwards on lift loads are queued for next Sat (W6).

flags: §4.A HR zones off rower-191 skew low for running (Adj #9) — nasal-breathing gate is the physiological reference, not the ≤155 cap
Easy pace creep trend (W4 Sat 10:38 → W5 Mon 9:21 → W5 Fri 9:35) — hold honest Z1 floor today, don't ride the 9:30s on a 45-min long run
No SI status reported overnight — do the screen before stepping out (Fortin, single-leg bridge); per §11.C if anything's off, downgrade not skip
Light day before tonight — keep effort honest, no Strava-induced ramp

targets.pace: 9:45–10:45/mi (§4.A Z1 band — sit mid-band ~10:00, not on the floor)
targets.hr: Nasal-clean throughout = aerobic ✓; ignore off-191 ≤155 cap per Adj #9
targets.cadence: 165–172 spm natural Z1 (don't force 180 at conversational pace)

cardio.warmup: 5 min walk → easy build into Z1 pace within the 45-min block
cardio.cooldown: 5–10 min easy walk + SI prehab (Tyler twists 3×15, reverse Tyler 3×15, McGill Big 3 5-3-1)
cues: Nasal breathing is the gate — if mouth opens at conversational pace, slow down regardless of HR
Flat terrain preferred (Hudson loop fine); no intentional hills per §7.B (W10 hill embargo)
Watch AM 5/24 for delayed SI / soreness — Sun is real rest
